evidence_headings: Literacy learning builds essential skills, stretches students' thinking and creativity.
Students thrive in classrooms that inspire their learning.
Students learn and grow to their best potential.
evidence_snippet: Skip to content Calendar Contact Us Our Schools X Facebook Instagram YouTube Linkedin E-newsletter Subscriptions Search for: Search Capital Region BOCES Main Menu Home About Us Adult Education Career & Technical Education Employment Programs & Services Special Education Professional Development Special Education Links:About Special Education Airline Drive Academy Maywood Academy Special Education Enrollment Student & Family Resources Capital Region BOCES > Special Education Special Education Literacy learning builds essential skills, stretches students' thinking and creativity. Students thrive in classrooms that inspire their learning. Students learn and grow to their best potential. Dedicated programs encourage engaged and confident learners. Providing quality educational programs for students with diverse needs in a safe, supportive and caring environment, helping them each achieve their individual potential. Contact your school district’s Committee on Special Education (CSE) for information about placement in our programs.
